hero_lead: Biomagnetism is a soft, non-invasive therapy that uses paired magnets to support your body’s natural balance — a quiet hour where your whole system gets to exhale.
about_p1: Lea is a certified biomagnetism practitioner attending clients in person on the Gold Coast and online around the world. Her sessions are unhurried and deeply personal — built on the belief that the body responds best when it feels safe and heard.
about_p2: Trained in biomagnetic pair therapy, she pairs a methodical scanning technique with genuine warmth, so every placement is chosen for you, never from a script.
book_title_1: Give your body an hour it will
book_p: Choose online or the Gold Coast studio — your first session includes a full personal scan.
what_intro: A gentle therapy built on one elegant idea: the body has its own balance — and pairs of magnets can help it find its way back.
s1_desc: A complete guided session from your own home — the same care, the same method, wherever you are.
s2_desc: The full hands-on experience in Lea's calm, private studio on the Gold Coast.
sessions_note: First session? Allow an extra 15 minutes for your initial assessment — included free.
